--- /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/work/VirtualBox-4.3.0/src/VBox/Main/src-server/freebsd/NetIf-freebsd.cpp.orig   2013-11-17 04:11:44.000000000 +0400

 #include <net/if_types.h>
 
+#include <stdlib.h>
+

 /*
  * route.h includes net/radix.h which for some reason defines Free as a wrapper

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: make -C /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose
